text: I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation as I find myself in this bright, modern space. The glass walls and the clean, angular design evoke a sense of openness and reflection. The bold 'R + D' sign and the creative displays draw me forward, inviting me to ponder how innovation shapes the way humans and machines interact. There is an air of possibility here, as if knowledge is just waiting to be uncovered by the inquisitive mind.
